status.integration_note: This isolated art package does not modify existing Core asset records, content hashes, renderer behavior, collision, telegraphs, route gates, or normal-route authority.

scope.selection_rationale: The trio covers M03's first recurring Fodder/Pressure composition (six Drowned Pilgrims plus two Bell Reeds in pack.bell.01 and B1) and B5's repeated Anchor threat (Chain Sentry plus Pilgrims).

design_authority: Gravebound_Production_GDD_v1_Canonical.md:ENC-001, ENC-002, ART-001, ART-002, ART-004, ART-005, ART-020, ART-030
Gravebound_Development_Roadmap_v1.md:GB-M03 private character-life route and M03 cumulative asset target

input_images.role: existing Core material/palette/style reference; not an edit target

generation.common_prompt: Create one isolated dark-fantasy 2D pixel-art normal-enemy idle reference frame on a perfectly flat #00ff00 chroma-key background. Use a top-down three-quarter game-sprite view, disciplined high-contrast pixel clusters, generous padding, no scenery, shadow, labels, UI, watermarks, attack pose, projectile, hostile telegraph, loot beam, exit ring, or safe-zone ring. The result must read at a 48 px normal-enemy footprint.

asset_prompts.sprite.enemy.drowned_pilgrim: A narrow hunched drowned pilgrim: rain-heavy charcoal hood, wet ash-brown robes, small tarnished-brass chest bell, lowered thin bone-and-wood wand, and a dark drowned void instead of a skull. It must be visibly human Fodder and distinct from armor or a shrine.
asset_prompts.sprite.enemy.bell_reed: A compact stationary hostile cluster: black dried marsh reeds around a cracked tarnished-brass bell and a small iron root cage. The bell faces slightly south; it reads as a Pressure enemy, not a doorway, safe lantern, shrine, loot, or playable object.
asset_prompts.sprite.enemy.chain_sentry: A broad squat faceless iron-and-charcoal sentry torso bound in thick black chains, with a short base, small vertical locked visor slit, and battered brass lock plate. It reads as an immovable Anchor enemy, never a door, chest, shrine, landmark, or player character.

postprocess.normalization: Trim alpha bounds, nearest-neighbor scale to fit a 44 px content box, center horizontally, and align the content bottom to y=48 on a transparent 48x48 canvas.
postprocess.collision_authority: None. Authoritative collision/hurtbox radii, telegraph timing, attack geometry, and enemy state remain in Core content/simulation records.

validation.alpha: Every runtime candidate is RGBA 48x48, has transparent corners, nonempty alpha coverage, and was inspected at 48 px and nearest-neighbor 96 px preview scales.
validation.visual_read: The trio is intentionally differentiated by narrow humanoid, warm brass/reed fixture, and broad chained plate silhouettes. No attack, projectile, telegraph, exit, loot, or safe-state visual is baked into the sprites.
validation.remaining_gate: Before any registry change, verify the 48 px candidates against the optimized native dungeon background and authoritative telegraphs at B1/B5. Confirm player/hostile/projectile hierarchy, position anchors, rendered scale, grayscale readability, and no collision or attack-origin implication.

license_provenance: Project-generated original material using OpenAI built-in image generation; existing project imagery was used only as an in-project visual reference. Commercial-rights and registry review remain required before shipping.
